Discover
Why Choose Us

Why Molecule

01

Elevated Rooftop Experience

Perched on the 4th floor above Mathura's skyline, Molecule offers an open-air escape where every table holds a view. Golden-hour skies meet candlelit ambiance in a space built for moments that linger.

02

Signature Fusion Cuisine

From Brew Atelier craft cocktails to Sunset Dining Deck's artisan plates — our kitchen fuses global culinary traditions with regional soul. Every dish is an experiment in flavour and finesse.

03

Premium Night Atmosphere

As the sun dips below Mathura's horizon, Molecule transforms — curated music, ambient lighting, and live events converge into a night that feels impossibly alive. This is where the city comes to feel something.

Live Events

Molecule Mathura · Open Air

SUNSET DINING DECK

Dine as Mathura Ignites

As the sky shifts from gold to crimson and the city softens into twilight, the Sunset Dining Deck becomes the finest table in Mathura. Open air. Unhurried. Entirely unforgettable.
